heroSkills.name: Snatch
heroSkills.description: Use your hero to kill an enemy and steal mana. The higher the Skill Level is, the more mana stolen.

heroSkills.name: HP Up
heroSkills.description: Increase your hero's Max HP.

heroSkills.name: Shuriken
heroSkills.description: Increase your hero's  Long-ranged Attack Strength, even while defending the tower.

heroSkills.name: Defend Tower
heroSkills.description: Attack with shurikens while in the tower. Increase this skill's Level to increase Attack Speed.

heroSkills.name: Dispatch
heroSkills.description: Reduce your hero's Re-dispatch and Respawn Delays.

heroSkills.name: Dodge
heroSkills.description: Create a chance of evading the enemy's attack.

heroSkills.name: Assassinate
heroSkills.description: Create a chance of finishing an enemy with one hit.

heroSkills.name: Build Tower
heroSkills.description: Increase your tower's Defense.

heroSkills.name: Repair
heroSkills.description: Repair your tower to restore its HP.

heroSkills.name: Shuriken
heroSkills.description: Throw a giant shuriken that pushes an enemy backward with a shock wave.

heroSkills.name: Bomb
heroSkills.description: Throw a bomb that pushes enemies backward with damage.

heroSkills.name: Poison Mist
heroSkills.description: Create a poisonous mist that inflicts damage on all surrounding enemies.

heroSkills.name: Smoke
heroSkills.description: Create smoke in front of your tower to incapacitate the enemy.

heroSkills.name: Defense Stance
heroSkills.description: Command your soldiers to take a defensive stance.

heroSkills.name: Lightning
heroSkills.description: Drop lightning to inflict damage to the entire enemy.

heroSkills.name: Lotus Blizzard
heroSkills.description: Throw a flurry of blades.

heroSkills.name: HP Up
heroSkills.description: Increase your hero's Max HP.

heroSkills.name: Natural Healing
heroSkills.description: Improve your natural healing power to restore HP with time.

heroSkills.name: ATK Up
heroSkills.description: Increase your hero's basic Attack Strength.

heroSkills.name: DEF Up
heroSkills.description: Increase your hero's Defense.

heroSkills.name: Mane Spikes
heroSkills.description: Spike your hero's mane to counter his attacker.

heroSkills.name: Deflect
heroSkills.description: Build muscle to deflect attackers.

heroSkills.name: Defend Tower
heroSkills.description: Attack the enemy while in your tower. Increase this skill's Level for improved damage.

heroSkills.name: Dispatch
heroSkills.description: Reduce your hero's Re-dispatch and Respawn Delays.

heroSkills.name: Charge
heroSkills.description: Increase the Movement Speed of surrounding units.

heroSkills.name: Feast
heroSkills.description: Eat meat to restore HP.

heroSkills.name: Berserk
heroSkills.description: Increase the Attack Speed of surrounding units.

heroSkills.name: Parry
heroSkills.description: Return damage to attackers with no damage on your end.

heroSkills.name: Draft
heroSkills.description: Draft soldiers to reduce Respawn Delay.

heroSkills.name: Lion Roar
heroSkills.description: Shout out loud to Stun enemies and push them backward.

heroSkills.name: Wave
heroSkills.description: Muster energy to attack. Increase Movement and Attack Strengths at the cost of your entire Defense.

heroSkills.name: Rally
heroSkills.description: Summon units to your hero's side.

heroSkills.name: HP Up
heroSkills.description: Increase your hero's Max HP.

heroSkills.name: Defend Tower
heroSkills.description: Enable to shoot Magic Spheres while in your tower. Increase this skill's Level for a broader Attack Range.

heroSkills.name: Multi Shot
heroSkills.description: Increase your number of Magic Spheres.

heroSkills.name: Mana Wall
heroSkills.description: Create a shield that neutralizes Long-ranged attacks while protecting nearby units.

heroSkills.name: Vampire
heroSkills.description: Restore HP while attacking.

heroSkills.name: Temptation
heroSkills.description: Create a chance of convering enemy units to your side.

heroSkills.name: Dispatch
heroSkills.description: Reduce your hero's Re-dispatch and Respawn Delays.

heroSkills.name: Mana Gain
heroSkills.description: Create a chance of regaining mana when attacked.

heroSkills.name: Encourage
heroSkills.description: Increase the damage and range of Long-ranged units.

heroSkills.name: Align
heroSkills.description: Send Melee units to the front and the Long-ranged to the back.

heroSkills.name: Balance
heroSkills.description: Equalize the HP of surrounding units.

heroSkills.name: Recharge
heroSkills.description: Increase Mana Regeneration Speed at the cost of your unit production for the skill's duration.

heroSkills.name: Recall
heroSkills.description: Recall your hero along with surrounding units to the front of your tower.

heroSkills.name: Convert Spirit
heroSkills.description: Convert your hero's HP to MP.

heroSkills.name: Return to Nature
heroSkills.description: Convert low-HP units into mana. Increase this skill's Level for a higher conversion rate.

heroSkills.name: Armageddon
heroSkills.description: Deliver a meteor attack, and then increase your tower's Mana Regeneration.

heroSkills.name: Stun
heroSkills.description: None

heroSkills.name: Smoke
heroSkills.description: None

heroSkills.name: Armageddon Buff
heroSkills.description: None

notes.skillAiBestCurrentReading: XlsSkill_Ai aligns more strongly with itemCodeCandidate and selected hero-skill ai codes than with raw row indices.
notes.heroAiBestCurrentReading: XlsHero_Ai groups rows by heroIdCandidate and exposes compact priority/timing grids for runtime AI behavior.
notes.passiveSkillBestCurrentReading: XlsHeroPassiveSkill carries named passive stat entries; several rows match XlsHeroSkill names directly and likely back the same runtime upgrade concepts.
notes.particleBestCurrentReading: XlsParticle is a compact bridge table from gameplay ids to particle/effect families, likely consumed together with PTC.
